{{Quote|These aren't the droids we're looking for.|A sandtrooper|<ref name="Episode IV" />}}
'''Alvien Squadron''' was one of three [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] that made up [[Desert Sands]].

==History==
{{Quote|Move along.|A sandtrooper|<ref name="Episode IV" />}}
In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Desert Sands was assigned to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in order to search for two droids containing [[Death Star plans/Legends|plans]] to the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]]. Alvien squad was assigned with [[Drax Squadron]] to search the same quadrant of the desert planet for an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] containing the droids that had jettisoned from a [[Tantive IV/Legends|Corellian corvette]]. After [[Zeta Squadron (Desert Sands)|Zeta Squadron]] followed a trail eventually leading to [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], Alvien was ordered to supplement the local detachment by setting up checkpoints at all roads entering the city in search of two [[Droid/Legends|droids]] that had left the escape pod.<ref name="Episode IV" />

When Jedi Master [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and a farmboy named [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] arrived in a landspeeder with the two droids in tow, sandtroopers in Alvien Squadron, stopped them and asked to see their identification. Kenobi, however, used a [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]] on one of the sandtroopers, convincing him that they didn't need to see their identification and the droids they were carrying weren't the droids Alvien Squadron was looking for. He told them to move along, and the droids the Empire was trying to find passed by them.<ref name="Episode IV" />
